title: RAY's LevelZ Compat
description: Brings compatibility and parity with levelz and several mods.
body:
<center>

![rays levelz compat logo wide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xR4YM0ND/RAYs-LevelZ-Compat/refs/heads/1.21.1/Gallery/logo_isometric_wide.png)

This mod brings compatibility and parity with levelz and several mods.

## Supported Mods:
</center>

<details>
<summary>Aether Dimension</summary>

- [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Aether Addon: Protect Your Moa](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-protect-your-moa)
- [Aether Addon: Treasure Reforging](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-treasure-reforging)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Let's Do Collection</summary>

- [Alpine Whispers](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-alpine-whispers)
- [Bakery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bakery-farmcharm-compat)
- [Beachparty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-beachparty)
- [BloomingNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bloomingnature)
- [Brewery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-brewery-farmcharm-compat)
- [Camping](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-camping)
- [Candlelight](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-candlelight-farmcharm-compat)
- [Farm and Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm)
- [Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-furniture)
- [Hearth and Timber](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-hearth-timber)
- [HerbalBrews](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews)
- [Lili's Lucky Lures](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-lilis-lucky-lures)
- [Lili's Pottery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-lilis-pottery)
- [Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow)
- [Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery)
- [WilderNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-wildernature)

</details>

<details>
<summary>RPG Series</summary>

- [Archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers)
- [Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/armory-rpg-series)
- [Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)
- [Paladins & Priests](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests)
- [Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-rpg)
- [Rouges & Warriors](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors)
- [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)

</details>

<center>

If you want support for other mods -> let me know.  

## Extra Notes
This mod replaces all levelz mods and datapacks on my profile, so you just need to download one mod instead of several for various levelz compats.

If you prefer the datapacks, view and download them on [github](https://github.com/xR4YM0ND/RAYs-LevelZ-Compat/tree/1.21.1/src/main/resources/resourcepacks).
